title: Administrative data sources in the production of official statistics – Children and youth
content:
## Administrative data sources in the production of official statistics – Children and youth
- Health of children and youth

## Health of children and youth
Statistics Canada uses the following vaccination data:
- patient’s immunization recor (type of antigen (vaccine name), date of immunization, immunizing agent (vaccine product or brand name)).
The following statistical program uses these data for statistical and research purposes only:
- Childhood National Immunization Coverage Survey
